skills.name: Fire and Run
skills.description: Aims the cannon at the player’s feet and fires to fly backward in recoil. You do not receive damage while the skill is in use.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR
Distance moved: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Explosion
skills.description: Shoots at the targeted enemy, causing a circular explosion around the targeted enemy.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 2
Surrounding Targets: CaptionRatio

skills.name: Menace Shot
skills.description: Carry the canon on your shoulder and fire a bomb toward the sky. Ememies around you are inflicted by Panic debuff.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Range: 80
Number of Targets: CaptionRatio
Debuff Duration: CaptionTime seconds

skills.name: Crouching Strike
skills.description: Slams the cannon on the ground to damage in straight range in front of you. Enemies are knocked down in place upon being hit.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 6 times
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Roar
skills.effect_text:
Matross Skill Damage increases by CaptionRatio %
Matross skill ignores Evasion and Block of the enemy knocked down by 50% chance

skills.name: Artillery Call
skills.description: Use to expand the sight and select a location far away.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 6 times
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

attributes.name: Fire and Run: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Fire and Run] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Fire and Run: Reduce Recoil
attributes.description:
* Reduces the distance moved from [Fire and Run] by half and increases damage to enemies by +50%

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Explosion: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Explosion] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Explosion: Chain Reaction
attributes.description:
* [Explosion] has 3% chance per attribute level to cause further explosions to enemies

(Applies 0.5% chance per attribute level in PVP)

* Increases SP consumption by 25%

attributes.name: Menace Shot: Achilles Heel
attributes.description:
* Cooldown of [Menace Shot] increases by 10 seconds

* Remove 3 removable buff of the target

attributes.name: Crouching Strike: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Crouching Strike] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Crouching Strike: Quake
attributes.description:
* Knockdown effect removed

* Cooldown changed to 10 seconds

* Skill AoE Attack Ratio increases by 6

* Final damage of the skill decreases by 40%

attributes.name: [Arts] Fire and Run: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Fire and Run] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Explosion: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Explosion] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Crouching Strike: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Crouching Strike] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Artillery Call: Remove Knockdown
attributes.description:
* Removes knockdown effect at the center when activated

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Artillery Call: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Artillery Call] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Artillery Call: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor of [Artillery Call] by 1.25% per attribute level
